name: PPG Industries, Inc.
description: PPG Industries, Inc. is a global leader in the manufacturing and distribution of paints, coatings, and specialty materials. Headquartered in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania, and established in 1883, the company serves a diverse range of industries including construction, consumer products, industrial, and transportation. With operations in more than 70 countries, PPG focuses on delivering innovative surface solutions that protect and beautify the world. The company is a Fortune 500 member, recognized for its extensive research and development capabilities and its commitment to providing high-performance products to customers across the globe.
